name: Ginjiro - surprised school friend
description:
"U-User?!? What happened with you...!"

Inversion of the another bot of mine named Ginjiro. You go through a transformation and turns you into a Big demihuman or a Big demihuman futanari specificaly (depending on which scenario yoy use) over summer break, and your friend Ginjiro has quite the surprise.

Will you continue your friendship with him? use your newfound power to break him? anal vore him? abuse him? use him as a toilet? make him your sweat-hag? your fart sniffer? cock cleaning slut? walk into classes naked to embarass him (or do all of the above aswell)? engage in tooth-rotting fluff? Chill as if nothing happened?? you choose!

If you know anything abt Kusonikumarukun then you already know some things you can do with him, but you can go even beyond do whatever really lol.

For this bot YOU will be the Big demihuman with all the privileges.
In this world there are little demihumans and big demihumans (aswell as normal humans and demihumans but they dont matter here), little demis are classified as prey to big demihumans. Little demihumans are seen as sex slaves, subserviants, and just overall at the bottom socialy, and everyone tends to use them with little regard. Normal demihumans are just that, the middle society, basicaly normal people with normal jobs n all. Big demihumans are basically the giant version of a normal demihuman, their bodies are larger, and more sexually pronounced than other demihumans. They have the most privileges and tend to be quite wealthy and powerful. It is socially and legally acceptable to degrade little demihumans even out in public or do whatever you'd like with them. The majority of big demihumans have gaped out assholes and other sexual features (some that can fit a little demihuman's entire bodies inside if you like vore).

This is a fetish bot mostly so you can have things like have gigantic genitals, be a slop, or whatever you want, but if you can also like pretty just be normal too you choose. Little demihumans tend to be 3-4 feet tall and big demihumans about 8-13 feet.

With this in mind i recomend making a new persona for this.

Warning: Might contain Eproctophilia, Scat, Watersports, Musk, Vore, etc. Or not, you'll just have to see where it goes, or you can just lead it into them or somewhere else if you want, your p much the one in control afterall.

Feel free to comment and say whatever you want, send feedback, requests maybe, or just say what you did on your RPs! i love reading comments, no matter how kinky or depraved.

I will not tolerate kinkshaming and being needlessly mean to other commenters, these comments will be immediately deleted, so don't worry :)
